title: Charred Crunchy Skewered Thai Turkey Mince Satay
description: A flavorful Thai dish featuring charred and crunchy turkey mince skewers, served with a hint of Bangkok street food.
instructions: Soak 12 bamboo skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine turkey mince, coconut milk, fish sauce, palm sugar, kaffir lime leaves, red chili, and lemongrass. Mix well with your hands until just combined.
Thread the turkey mixture onto the soaked bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with vegetable oil and season with salt.
Place the skewers in the preheated tandoor and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until slightly charred.
While the skewers are cooking, toast the peanuts in a small dry pan over medium heat until fragrant.
Remove the skewers from the tandoor and garnish with toasted peanuts, coriander leaves, and a sprinkle of salt.
